entry.title: KFC Introduces New Wedges and Queso Dip
entry.summary:
KFC launches new Wedges and Queso Dip as a shareable side ahead of the Super Bowl this Sunday.
Available as a digital exclusive on the KFC website and mobile app at participating locations nationwide, Wedges and Queso Dip features a large side of crispy, seasoned potato wedges paired with 16 ounces of queso dip (something that is not normally on the KFC menu). Prices vary, but my local KFC in Los Angeles charges $8.99 for an order. For a limited time, the fried chicken chain is also offering a "20 wings for $20" deal to its KFC Rewards members. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Chick-fil-A Tests New Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich
entry.summary:
Chick-fil-A is testing two new sandwiches for a limited time: the Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich and the Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich.
The Avocado Sriracha BLT Sandwich (pictured) is testing at participating locations in Oklahoma City, OK, and features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet served with green leaf lettuce, tomato, seasoned avocado mash, and applewood-smoked bacon on Sriracha Swirl Toast (which is toasted bread swirled with a "sriracha style seasoning blend"). Cayenne Ranch Sauce is included on the side for those who want to add more heat. The sandwich is also available with a spicy or grilled filet. Prices range from $7.69 (for the Original Chicken filet) to $8.65 (for the grilled filet). ️The Sweet Chili Lime Crunch Sandwich is available at participating locations in the Piedmont Triad area (Greensboro, High Point, and Winston-Salem) of North Carolina. It features a crispy-fried Original Chicken filet, Ginger Lime Cool Crunch (a mix of cabbage, kale, and ginger lime dressing), and sweet chili sauce, served on a toasted, buttered bun. It can also be ordered with a spicy or grilled chicken filet. Prices range from $6.19 to $7.09, depending on your choice of filet. Both sandwiches are available, while supplies last, through March 7, 2026. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.summary:
Crispy Chicken Nuggets make a limited-time return to Taco Bell and are joined by new Hidden Valley Diablo Ranch Sauce.
The new dipping sauce features the "signature, creamy flavor of Hidden Valley Ranch with the smoky, rich heat of Taco Bell's iconic Diablo sauce." Hidden Valley Ranch is the original ranch dressing, while Diablo sauce is Taco Bell's spiciest regularly available sauce. Taco Bell's Crispy Chicken Nuggets feature pieces of white-meat chicken covered in a crispy-fried breading that includes flakes of tortilla. The suggested price for a 5-piece order is $4.99, and a 10-piece order costs $7.99. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Baskin-Robbins Brings Back Love Potion #31 Along with New Love Potion #31 Cappy
entry.summary:
Love Potion #31 ice cream returns to Baskin-Robbins as its February 2026 Flavor of the Month and is featured in the new Love Potion #31 Cappy. The ice cream parlor chain also welcomes two new ice cream cakes for the 2026 Valentine's Day season.
Love Potion #31 features white chocolate and raspberry-flavored ice creams with raspberry swirls, chocolate‑flavored chips, and raspberry‑filled chocolate hearts. The new Love Potion #31 Cappy features Love Potion #31 blended with Arabica coffee, topped with whipped cream and a fudge drizzle. The new Valentine's Day ice cream cakes include the Vintage Heart Cake and Vintage Cherry Cake. The Vintage Heart Cake is a heart-shaped cake featuring a light pink frosted base trimmed with pink, red, and white borders and dotted with frosted hearts. The Vintage Cherry Cake is also a heart-shaped cake, but is decorated differently with "cherries, romantic piping, and heart details." Both cakes can be made with your choice of ice cream and cake. They come in two sizes: a small size meant for two to four people and a large size to feed up to 12 people. The Valentine's Day-themed cakes, ice cream, and Cappy are now available for a limited time nationwide. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Jack in the Box Serves Up New Protein Bowls
entry.summary:
Jack in the Box bolsters its rice bowl and wrap offerings with the addition of the new Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl (it's also now referring to its rice bowls as "protein bowls") and the Fajita Jack Wrap. It also adds Jack's Sugar Cookie and Red Bull Peach Edition.
The Chicken Fajita Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice with grilled onions, roasted corn, black beans, cheddar cheese & Chipotle Ranch. It joins the Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl on the menu. The Chicken Teriyaki Protein Bowl features crispy-fried or grilled chicken served over white or brown rice, accompanied by broccoli, carrots, and a teriyaki sauce. Both bowls start at $7.69. They can also be ordered as part of a combo meal that includes an egg roll and a drink. The Fajita Jack Wrap consists of crispy-fried or grilled chicken strips, shredded lettuce, shredded cheddar, grilled onions, tomato, and Chipotle Ranch wrapped in a warm tortilla. Pricing starts at $3 (you can also mix and match any Jack Wrap at 2 for $6). Jack's Sugar Cookie is a buttery sugar cookie decorated with icing in one of four Jack faces. The price tag on the cookie starts at $2.49. Red Bull Peach Edition is offered at Jack in the Box by the can and as part of a Red Bull Infusion beverage mixed with either strawberry & tangerine syrup or mixed berry syrup. Prices start at $2.99 for a can and $4.99 for an Infusion. Photo via Jack in the Box. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Krispy Kreme's 2026 Valentine's Day Donuts Arrive
entry.summary:
Krispy Kreme is ready for Valentine's Day this month with the arrival of its 2026 Valentine's Day Collection of donuts.
This year's Valentine's donuts include: - New I Love You a Choco-Lot Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with chocolate-flavored Kreme, dipped in red vanilla-flavored icing, and topped with a chocolate icing ribbon and bow. - New Teddy Bear Cookies & Kreme Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Cookies & Kreme, dipped in chocolate icing, and topped with a white chocolate bear face. - New You're Berry Sweet Donut - A heart-shaped donut filled with Kreme, dipped in strawberry-flavored icing, and topped with a red vanilla-flavored drizzle and an XOXO sugar piece. - New Sprinkled with Love Donut - An Original Glazed donut piped with buttercream-flavored frosting and heart sprinkles. The donuts are available individually or by the dozen in a Valentine's Day-themed box at participating locations across the US starting Tuesday, February 3, through Valentine's Day (Saturday, February 14, 2026). You can also find them in a six-pack at select grocery retailers. In addition to the introduction of this year's Valentine's Day donuts, Krispy Kreme is offering a Groundhog Day deal through Tuesday, February 3, 2026, where you can get $6 off any Assorted Dozen at participating locations. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Spicy Jack Quesadilla Returns to Del Taco
entry.summary:
The Spicy Jack Quesadilla has returned to Del Taco for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide.
The Spicy Jack Quesadilla features shredded spicy Jack cheese and tangy green sauce (AKA salsa verde) folded in a flour tortilla and grilled. A Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla and its meal are also available. The Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla features marinated grilled chicken added to the Spicy Jack Quesadilla, while the Spicy Jack Chicken Quesadilla Meal pairs the quesadilla with crinkle-cut fries and a drink. Both quesadillas are available through March 23, 2026. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Fudge Brownie Football Cookie
entry.summary:
Ahead of the Super Bowl, Crumbl bakes a new Fudge Brownie Football Cookie as part of its weekly rotation from February 2 through February 7, 2026. Here's what this week's limited-time lineup looks like:
- Fudge Brownie Football Cookie - A brownie-inspired cookie topped with fudge frosting and white cream cheese "football laces." - Dubai Cookie - Returning for yet another week, the Dubai Cookie is a brownie cookie layered with a crunchy kataifi and pistachio filling, finished with milk chocolate and a drizzle of pistachio cream. - Peanut Butter Cup Brownie featuring Reese's - A brownie topped with peanut butter mousse, a chocolate drizzle, and Reese's Peanut Butter Cup pieces. - Caramel Shortbread Cookie featuring Twix - A shortbread-inspired cookie filled with Twix pieces, topped with caramel, milk chocolate, and chopped Twix pieces. - Confetti Cake Cookie - A sugar cookie with confetti sprinkles, topped with pink vanilla cream cheese frosting and more confetti sprinkles. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Asiago Bagel Stacks are Back at Panera
entry.summary:
Panera reintroduces Asiago Bagel Stacks as a permanent addition to its lunch and dinner menu. They are joined by a new, limited-time trio of Breakfast Bagel Stacks.
The permanent Asiago Bagel Stacks include: - Chicken Roma Asiago Bagel Stack - Grilled chicken, melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, chopped basil, fresh arugula, Green Goddess dressing, salt,, pepper, and a garlic aioli drizzle on an Asiago Bagel.​ - Spicy Steak Asiago Bagel Stack - Marinated steak, melty provolone, creamy salsa verde spread, fresh arugula, red onions, and sweet peppers on an Asiago Bagel.​ As for the new, limited-time Breakfast Bagel Stacks (breakfast items are available before 11AM), they include: - Wake-Up BLT Asiago Everything Bagel Stack (pictured) - Applewood-smoked bacon, scrambled egg, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on a new Asiago Everything Bagel. The new bagel is a bagel baked with "sharp and tangy" asiago cheese and an everything bagel seasoning made of sesame seeds, poppy seeds, dried garlic, dried onion, and salt. - Farmhouse Duo Asiago Bagel Stack - Applewood-smoked bacon, sausage patty, scrambled egg, salt, pepper, and cheesy benedict sauce, served on an Asiago Bagel. - Sausage & Egg Asiago Bagel Stack -A sausage patty, scrambled egg, melty American cheese, salt, pepper, and garlic aioli, served on an Asiago Bagel. Other new items at Panera include: - Asiago Croissant Twists - Two all-butter croissant twists topped with asiago cheese. - Toasted Caprese Focaccia - Melty fresh mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh arugula, basil pesto spread, salt, pepper, and balsamic glaze, served on Black Pepper Focaccia. The new Asiago Everything Bagel can also be purchased on its own. Photo via Panera Bread. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Chick-fil-A Adds Frosted Sodas and Floats to Permanent Menu
entry.summary:
Chick-fil-A welcomes new Frosted Sodas and Floats as a permanent part of its beverage menu.
Frosted Sodas feature your choice of fountain beverage blended with Icedream frozen dairy dessert, while Floats sees your choice of fountain beverage layered with Icedream frozen dairy dessert. Fountain beverage options at Chick-fil-A include Coca-Cola, Dr Pepper, Sprite, Fanta, Powerade, Hi-C, Barq's Root Beer, and more. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Digital Deals Through Mid-February 2026
entry.summary:
Taco Bell has released its schedule of digital deals through mid-February 2026. The slate includes a series of Tuesday Drops, in-app deals, and third-party delivery deals. Here's what it looks like:
Tuesday Drops (available exclusively to Taco Bell Rewards members through the chain's mobile app)
2/3/26 - $1 Burrito Supreme for 1 hour from 2PM to 3PM (limit 1 per user). 2/10/26 - $1 Nachos BellGrande for the first 30,000 Rewards Members starting at 2PM PT (limit 1 per user). 2/17/ 26 - $1 Cheesy Gordita Crunch for 1 hour from 2PM to 3PM PT (limit 1 per user).
In-App Deals
2/3/26 to 2/24/26 - Every Tuesday, get a $1 delivery fee with the purchase of $25 or more. 2/1/26 to 2/28/26 - During February, place three separate orders on the app and get a reward for 20% off a $10+ order (limit…

entry.title: Hershey's Chocomania Donuts Return to Krispy Kreme
entry.summary:
Chocomania has returned to Krispy Kreme and brings with it a set of four new donuts glazed with Hershey's chocolate. The 2026 Krispy Kreme x Hershey's Chocomania Collection is available now through Sunday, February 1, 2026, and includes:
- New Chocolate Cheesecake Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut topped with a swirl of cheesecake topping and Hershey's mini chocolate chips. - New Chocolate Chip Cookie Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut dipped in chocolate icing and Hershey's Chocolate Chip Cookie Crunch. - New Chocolate Party Donut - A Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed donut with Hershey's chocolate drizzle and rainbow nonpareils. - New Hershey's Chocolate Original Glazed Donut - An Original Glazed donut covered in Hershey's chocolate glaze. Last year's batch of Chocomania Donuts featured Hershey's Milk Chocolate icing, whereas this year's key feature is new Hershey's chocolate glaze. The donut chain is also offering a deal this weekend, from Friday, January 30, 2026, through Sunday, February 1, 2026, where you can get a dozen Original Glazed donuts for $2 when you buy any dozen donuts. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Shake Shack Introduces New True Love Shake
entry.summary:
Shake Shack introduces the new True Love Shake as a Valentine's Day-themed shake to join its 2025-2026 winter shake lineup.
The True Love Shake features vanilla frozen custard blended with strawberry puree and poured into a cup lined with a crackable dark chocolate shell. The shake is then topped with chocolate whipped cream and strawberry curls. On February 10, 2026 (Red Tuesday, known as the most common day for breaking up), you can get 50% off a True Love Shake (to help soothe any heartbreak, apparently). Then on February 14, 2026 (Valentine's Day), if you buy a True Love Shake, you can get one for free. Both deals are only available when ordering through an in-restaurant kiosk or through the Shake Shack website or mobile app, at participating locations. The code for the Red Tuesday deal is "SELFLOVE", while the code for the Valentine's Day deal is "SHARELOVE". Shake Shack's winter shake lineup also includes: - Tiramisu Shake - Tiramisu frozen custard blended with coffee, topped with whipped cream, cocoa, and a ladyfinger cookie. - New Chocolate Blackout Pudding Shake - Chocolate blackout pudding frozen custard blended with chocolate graham cracker crunch, topped with chocolate whipped cream and crumbled chocolate graham crackers. - K-Shack Spicy Caramel Shake - Vanilla frozen custard blended with a gochujang caramel sauce, topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of gochujang caramel sauce. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Papa John's Debuts "Reimagined" Pan Pizza
entry.summary:
Papa Johns introduces a "reimagined" Pan Pizza starting Thursday, January 29, 2026. The new version features "crispy caramelized edges, a pillowy, airy center, and an indulgent six-cheese blend."
Specifically, the updated Pan Pizza features a thick, fluffy crust with Parmesan and Special Garlic Sauce baked between the crust and pan for a caramelized finish and crispy crunch. The six-cheese blend includes cheese made from Mozzarella, Provolone, Fontina, Asiago, Parmesan, and Romano. The pizza is finished with a dusting of Italian seasonings. At launch, Papa Johns will be offering medium 1-topping Pan Pizza for $11.99, at participating locations nationwide. The chain's previous Pan Pizza (you can find my review of that version here) was discontinued in 2019. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Dunkin's 2025-2026 Winter Menu Includes New Protein Milk
entry.summary:
Dunkin' welcomes new Protein Milk as a beverage add-on and is featuring it in several drinks in its 2025-2026 winter menu.
The new Protein Milk offers a "creamy, familiar taste without a chalky texture or aftertaste" and adds 15 grams of protein in a medium drink. It can be added to any drink that can have a milk or alternative milk base, including coffees, lattes, matcha, and Refreshers. Based on the ingredients and employee accounts, the Protein Milk is Lactaid Protein 2% Reduced Fat Milk, which is mostly a mix of reduced-fat milk and ultra-filtered skim milk (and includes the lactase enzyme because that's how Lactaid works). The beverages featuring Protein Milk include: - Megan's Mango Protein Refresher - Mango pineapple flavor mixed with Protein Milk. The drink was created in collabor…

entry.title: KFC Tests New Handheld Pot Pie
entry.summary:
KFC is testing a new Handheld Pot Pie that's basically a hand-held version of the chain's regular Pot Pie.
The Handheld Pot Pie is being tested for a limited time at select locations in several states, including South Carolina, Georgia, Alabama, and Rhode Island. It is priced at around $3.99 (the price varies with location) and, like its bigger Pot Pie brother, it is filled with fried chicken, diced potatoes, peas, carrots, and "savory" sauce, but with a flaky hand-held crust instead of a traditional pot pie crust in a pie tin. It's also available in a combo meal with Secret Recipe Fries and a drink for $7.99 Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: McDonald's Debuts New Hot Honey Sauce
entry.summary:
McDonald's introduces new Hot Honey Sauce for a limited time. The new sauce is described as a "blend of sweet honey and spicy heat, infused with a subtle vinegar note."
You can get McDonald's Hot Honey Sauce in a dip cup with an order of Chicken McNuggets or McCrispy Strips, or purchase it separately for a small additional charge. The new sauce is also featured in several menu items, including: - Hot Honey Sausage Egg Biscuit - A pork sausage patty, folded egg, and Hot Honey Sauce served on a biscuit. - Bacon Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, thick-cut applewood-smoked bacon, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, mayo served on a toasted potato roll. - Hot Honey McCrispy Sandwich - A McCrispy filet, Hot Honey Sauce, crispy-fried jalapenos, shredded lettuce, and mayo served on a toasted potato roll. - Hot Honey Snack Wrap - A McCrispy strip, shredded cheese, shredded lettuce, and Hot Honey Sauce wrapped in a tortilla. While most of the selection consists of regular menu items with Hot Honey Sauce added, the crispy-fried jalapenos are a limited-time ingredient for the promotion. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Domino's Offers $6.99 Large 2-Topping Pizza Carryout Deal
entry.summary:
This week, Domino's is offering a limited-time deal where you can get large 2-topping pizzas for $6.99 each when ordering for carryout through Sunday, February 1 2026, at participating locations nationwide.
The limited-time deal is available with several crust options, including Hand Tossed, Crunchy Thin, or New York Style crust. You can also get Parmesan Stuffed Crust for an extra charge (note that the crust only comes in medium). The deal makes for a $1 savings (and one extra topping) over Domino's long-running $7.99 large one-topping carryout deal. The deal may be slightly higher in some areas (it costs $7.99 here in Los Angeles). Photo via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Taco Bell - Salted Caramel Churros
entry.summary:
Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros feature mini churros with a creamy filling, dusted with salted caramel sugar.
These come three to an order and cost me $2.29. Out of the bag, these looked pretty pale and disappointingly small. You can easily eat each one in a single bite.
The churros were light and crispy with a bit of chew under the crust. The filling is the same cream cheese icing that you find in Taco Bell's Cinnabon Delights. The salted caramel sugar was salty but lacked much of a caramel flavor. It seemed to be the same stuff they used for the Dulce del Leche Cinnamon Delights last year. I wouldn't have thought they were caramel-flavored at all if I didn't already know.
Overall, Taco Bell's Salted Caramel Churros were a miss for me. There's not all that much to nom on, and the main flavor is the creamy filling that you can already get from Cinnabon Delights. They had me missing when Taco Bell still offered a regular churro. Read more at Brand Eating!
